steps.title: Identify what the question requires
steps.content: The question asks for the year when both museums combined had the highest number of visits—meaning the year with the greatest total across both institutions.

steps.title: Calculate combined totals and find the maximum
steps.content:
Adding the visits for each year:
2016: 1.1 + 0.73 = 1.83M
2017: 1.2 + 2.4 = 3.6M
2018: 1.1 + 1.9 = 3.0M
2019: 0.96 + 2.0 = 2.96M

The year 2017 shows the highest combined total at 3.6 million visits. The other years all show lower combined totals. That matches choice D — D is correct.
